title: RBI Penalty Order - Fair Practices Code & KYC Non-Compliance
description: <cite index="31-3">RBI imposed a penalty of Rs 63.6 lakh on Bank of Baroda for non-compliance with certain provisions of the 'Fair Practices Code for Lenders' and 'Know Your Customer (KYC)' norms.</cite> <cite index="31-6">The bank had collected interest higher than the contracted rate of interest in certain loan accounts.</cite>
